findings.issue: 首句把自己写成了 transition profile，先讲“从 analytics 转过来”，会弱化 6-8 秒首扫时的 backend 角色锚点。
findings.fix: 把首句改成角色先行的写法，例如先写“Backend engineer with hands-on Java/C++/Go experience across security and internal systems”，再把转型背景放到后半句。

findings.field: TikTok · Security | Project: Security Investigation Retrieval Assistant, bullet 2
findings.issue: 在安全场景里写了 AWS Bedrock + RAG 工作流，但没有明确说明是否使用了 redacted prompts、sandbox evaluation、no user data 或 no production data。对 HR 来说边界还不够清楚。
findings.fix: 补一个明确的数据边界限定语，例如“evaluated on redacted internal prompts in a sandbox; no user or production data involved.”

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Rewrite Summary sentence 1 to lead with backend role and domain signal instead of transition framing.
[SHOULD] Add an explicit data-boundary qualifier to the TikTok Bedrock/RAG project bullet.
[NICE] Keep the rest of the structure; it already maps well to the AWS backend brief.
